searchDocs.title: Features​
searchDocs.content: Predictable Flow: Use loadSequence or sort to guarantee your modules initialize exactly when you expect.Memory Profiling: Automatically assigns debug.setmemorycategory to every module's thread and RunService loop.Isolated Startup: Errors in one module won't stop the rest of your game from loading (unless you want to).Event Routing: Connect modules directly to engine events or custom signals with selective binding and uniform cleanup.

searchDocs.title: Wally​
searchDocs.content: The package name + version is  ldgerrits/bootstrapper@^1.0.1

searchDocs.title: 1. Predictable Initialization​
searchDocs.content: Load your modules and determine whether Bootstrapper should inject self.  local Bootstrapper = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Bootstrapper) local coreSuccess, coreServices = Bootstrapper.loadSequence({ Server.Services.DataService, Server.Services.NetworkService, Server.Services.DatabaseService, }) -- Load the rest of your modules in bulk local _, featureServices = Bootstrapper.loadDescendants(Server.Features) -- Ensure the modules always initialize alphabetically if you do not add a . local sortedFeatures = Bootstrapper.sort(featureServices)

searchDocs.title: 2. Lifecycles​
searchDocs.content: Execute methods across all loaded modules.  -- Block thread until all 'init' methods finish Bootstrapper.callSync(services, "init", gameState) -- Fire 'start' methods and move on immediately Bootstrapper.callAsync(services, "start")

searchDocs.title: 3. Events​
searchDocs.content: Route engine and game events directly to your module methods.  -- Hook into RunService local cleanupHeartbeat = Bootstrapper.heartbeat(services, "onHeartbeat") -- Only modules with 'onStateChanged' will connect to GameState.Changed local cleanupStateChanged = Bootstrapper.bind(services, GameState.Changed, "onStateChanged") -- Later, safely disconnect everything cleanupHeartbeat() cleanupStateChanged()

searchDocs.title: matchesName​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.matchesName( matchName: string-- The string pattern to match against the module's name. ) → Predicate Creates a predicate function that matches a module's name against a string.

searchDocs.title: loadChildren​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> Bootstrapper.loadChildren( parent: Instance ,-- The Instance to search within. options: { predicate: Predicate?, self: boolean? }?-- Options for filtering and self-injection. ) → boolean,Modules,{[ModuleScript ]: string}-- (Success, Successful Modules, Failed Scripts) Requires all direct child ModuleScripts within a given parent.

searchDocs.title: loadDescendants​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> Bootstrapper.loadDescendants( parent: Instance ,-- The Instance to search within. options: { predicate: Predicate?, self: boolean? }?-- Options for filtering and self-injection. ) → boolean,Modules,{[ModuleScript ]: string}-- (Success, Successful Modules, Failed Scripts) Requires all descendant ModuleScripts within a given parent.

searchDocs.title: loadSequence​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> Bootstrapper.loadSequence( sequence: {ModuleScript },-- Array of ModuleScripts. options: {self: boolean?}?-- Options for self-injection. ) → boolean,Modules,{[ModuleScript ]: string}-- (Success, Ordered Modules, Failed Scripts) Requires specific modules in a guaranteed order.

searchDocs.title: sort​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.sort( modules: Modules,-- The collection to sort. sortFunction: (( a: any, b: any ) → boolean)?-- Optional custom comparator. ) → {any}-- Sorted array of modules. Converts a module collection into a deterministic array. Defaults to alphabetical sorting by module name if no sortFunction is provided.

searchDocs.title: callSync​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> Bootstrapper.callSync( modules: Modules,-- The dictionary or array of loaded modules. methodName: string,-- The name of the function to call on the modules. ...: any-- Additional arguments to pass to the method. ) → boolean,Modules,{[any]: string}-- (Success, Successful Modules, Failure Map) Executes a method on all modules and yields the calling thread until all modules have finished. Returns a success boolean, the surviving modules, and a map of crash errors.

searchDocs.title: callAsync​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.callAsync( modules: Modules,-- The dictionary or array of loaded modules. methodName: string,-- The name of the function to call on the modules. ...: any-- Additional arguments to pass to the method. ) → () Executes a method on all modules asynchronously using task.spawn (Fire and forget).

searchDocs.title: bind​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.bind( modules: Modules,-- The dictionary or array of loaded modules. source: EventSource,-- A Signal (e.g., PlayerAdded) or a subscription function. methodName: string-- The name of the function to trigger. ) → Cleanup-- A uniform cleanup function to disconnect the event. Binds a method across all modules to a Signal, Custom Signal, or Callback Subscription.

searchDocs.title: heartbeat​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.heartbeat( modules: Modules, methodName: string ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.Heartbeat.

searchDocs.title: renderStepped​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.renderStepped( modules: Modules, methodName: string, priority: number? ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.RenderStepped (Client-side only).

searchDocs.title: preSimulation​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.preSimulation( modules: Modules, methodName: string, frequency: Enum.StepFrequency? ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.PreSimulation.

searchDocs.title: postSimulation​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.postSimulation( modules: Modules, methodName: string ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.PostSimulation.

searchDocs.title: preAnimation​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.preAnimation( modules: Modules, methodName: string ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.PreAnimation.

searchDocs.title: preRender​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.preRender( modules: Modules, methodName: string, priority: number? ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.PreRender.
